product.name: downluxe Goose Feather and Down Pillows - Hotel Collection Feather Pillows Set of 2 for Back, Stomach or Side Sleepers, Queen Size (20"x28")
features: High Quality Filling: You will receive two Queen size goose feather and down pillows measure 20" x 28", 31 oz filling weight, filled with 10% goose down and 90% goose feather. Finished with well stitching and reinforced seams
Super Soft Cover: Our GOOSE feather pillows feature an ultra-soft, breathable lyocell shell that's gentle on the skin and suitable for all seasons—ensuring you a comfortable night's sleep

Premium Design: All down feather pillows are finished with a decorative piped edge. Unique double layered fabric design to avoid feathers poke you or go crunch in the night. You have to try it in order to believe it

Oeko Tex Certified: Downluxe goose down feather pillows are filled with Ethically-Sourced goose down and feathers and our pillows comply with STANDARD 100 by OEKO TEX. We hope to contribute to environmental protection just like you
Care Instructions: Our down feather pillows queen size set of 2 are easily to keep as clean as new, simply Machine Wash in gentle cycle with cold water and sundry or tumble dry on low when needed
